ValidationRule.description: Total Quantity field cannot be updated.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED( CONTAINER_Total_Job_Quantity__c ), CONTAINER_Total_Job_Quantity__c < CONTAINER_WIP_Job_Quantity__c, NOT( $Permission.CONTAINER_Bypass_Validation_Rule ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Total Job Quantity cannot be less than WIP Job Quantity.
